overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire running continuously through a desert canyon environment. The clip features warm golden hour lighting casting long shadows across the sandy terrain and rocky canyon walls.

agents.ego_description: character running steadily through the sandy canyon, arms swinging naturally with the gait, heading toward distant rock formations

entered.detail: tall layered rock formation forming the left wall of the canyon, showing sedimentary striations
steep rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the canyon passage
large isolated rock formation standing prominently in the center of the canyon ahead
rippled sand surface with visible tire tracks and footprints covering the canyon floor
flat-topped mountain range visible in the far background beyond the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a wide desert canyon during golden hour, with steep cliff walls flanking both sides and a prominent rock butte visible ahead. The sandy ground shows travel tracks, and warm sunlight illuminates the scene from the left, casting long shadows across the terrain.

events.description: canyon walls close in significantly, transitioning from wide open space to narrow enclosed passage

agents.ego_description: character continues running through the narrowing canyon, navigating the winding sandy path as the walls draw closer on both sides

entered.detail: jagged rock formation protruding from the left canyon wall at mid-distance
brightly illuminated golden rock wall at the end of the canyon passage
curving sandy trail leading deeper into the canyon system

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows considerably as the character runs deeper into the passage, with cliff walls now looming close on both sides. The central rock formation passes out of view behind, while new sunlit cliff faces become visible ahead. The path curves gently to the right through the enclosed rocky terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide desert canyon that gradually tightens into a narrow, enclosed rocky passage. It begins with the character running across a broad sandy floor flanked by steep cliffs, with a prominent rock butte standing ahead under the warm glow of golden hour sunlight. As the character advances, the open terrain begins to compress and the central rock formation recedes behind the camera. The scene then shifts as the cliff walls loom closer on both sides, narrowing the path and casting deeper shadows. Finally, the camera follows the character as the route curves gently to the right, moving toward new sunlit cliff faces deeper within the canyon.
